finding: Langerhans Cell Histiocytosis — Bone — Vertebral body (DDx)

differentials.name: Ewing sarcoma ›  Long bone: most commonly femur [humerus] [tibia]
differentials.raw: Ewing sarcoma ›  Long bone: most commonly femur

context: soft-tissue component : T1-isointense + T2-hyperintense + enhancement; isoechoic | "floating teeth" = destruction of alveolar ridge | lytic lesion in early disease | vertebra plana = symmetric uniform vertebral collapse + preservation of intervertebral
